etymology.description: semantic: ιΚΜ(ιΚΜ) (mΟΓ, "hemp") + phonetic: ηôé(ηôé) (h«î, "tiger") -> combined to convey a flag or banner used as a military signal
etymology.interpretation: The character ιΚΨ(ιΚΨ) (huΡΪ, "military signal") combines ιΚΜ(ιΚΜ) (mΟΓ, "hemp"), suggesting a fibrous material like that used for flags, with ηôé(ηôé) (h«î, "tiger"), which is used for phonetic representation. The combination reflects the use of a distinct and visible signal in military contexts.
